title: neocheiropteris buergeriana
intro: Neocheiropteris buergeriana, also known as Buerger's fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neocheiropteris buergeriana include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional remedies for skin conditions and wounds.
